description: Complete updated corpus that adds GCD-jump recurrences as a bounded sparse witness-gate research profile while preserving Draft 2 structure.

changed_documents.duotronic_witness_contract_v10_10.md: Adds GCD-jump sparse witness gates as optional L2/L2M runtime/research section.
Adds short DPFC boundary for GCD-jump recurrence adapters; no arithmetic mutation.
changed_documents.refs/duotronic_source_architecture_overv: Updates corpus map and explains where GCD-jump recurrences belong.

boundary_statement: GCD-jump recurrences are a bounded runtime/research profile for sparse witness gates. They do not redefine DPFC arithmetic, transport validation, normalizer behavior, migration rules, or policy authority.
